questions.q: In duckdb, briefly describe what `files_created_by_duckdb` is or does.
ref_phrases: Files Created by DuckDB DuckDB creates several files and directories on disk.
This page lists both the global and the local ones.
The commands can be both dot command and SQL statements.
The naming of this file follows the ~/.bashrc and ~/.zshrc “run commands” files.

questions.q: In duckdb, briefly describe what `my_workload_is_slow` is or does.
ref_phrases: More detailed instructions are linked for each point.
Do you have enough memory?
DuckDB works best if you have 5-10 GB memory per CPU core .
Are you using a fast disk?
questions.source_excerpt: My Workload Is Slow If you find that your workload in DuckDB is slow, we recommend performing the following checks. More detailed instructions are linked for each point. questions.source_excerpt: std/private/since Source Edit since is used to emulate older versions of nim stdlib, see tuse_version . nim . If a symbol foo is added in version ( 1 , 3 , 5 ) , use { . since : ( 1.3 . 5 ) . } , not { . since : ( 1.4 ) . } , so that it works in devel in between releases. The emulation cannot be 100
